hooks.command: WORKLOG="/Users/david/Documents/data ops/WORKLOG.md"; if [ -f "$WORKLOG" ]; then content=$(tail -n 200 "$WORKLOG"); jq -n --arg ctx "$content" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: ("# Project worklog (tail)\n\n" + $ctx)}}'; else jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: "No WORKLOG.md yet at /Users/david/Documents/data ops/WORKLOG.md — consider creating one."}}'; fi
